signals.headline: Iran announces Strait of Hormuz "completely open" amid ceasefire, prompting Trump "Thank you" and 10%+ oil price drop |
signals.raw:
Iran announces Strait of Hormuz "completely open" amid ceasefire, prompting Trump "Thank you" and 10%+ oil price drop | YES | HIGH confidence**[1][2]

Iranian FM Abbas Araghchi confirmed on X Friday (April 17) that maritime traffic through the Strait is "declared completely open for the remaining period of ceasefire" via a "coordinated route," linked to the US-brokered Israel-Lebanon ceasefire exp
matched_markets: US x Iran permanent peace deal by April 22, 2026?
